# Concrete Knowhow — Full Reference

## Concrete Slab Calculator

Formulas:
- Rectangular: vol_ft³ = length_ft × width_ft × thickness_ft
- Round: vol_ft³ = π × (diameter_ft / 2)² × thickness_ft
- vol_yd³ = vol_ft³ / 27
- 60 lb bags = ceil(vol_ft³ / 0.45)
- 80 lb bags = ceil(vol_ft³ / 0.60)
- Waste buffer: +5% or +10% recommended

Threshold: Ready-mix concrete is more economical above ~1 cubic yard (27 cubic feet).

## Gravel Calculator

Formulas:
- vol_ft³ = length_ft × width_ft × depth_ft
- vol_yd³ = vol_ft³ / 27
- tons = vol_yd³ × bulk_density (typically 1.4 t/yd³ for pea gravel, 1.5 for crushed stone)

## Mulch Calculator

Formulas:
- vol_ft³ = length_ft × width_ft × depth_ft
- vol_yd³ = vol_ft³ / 27
- 2 ft³ bags = ceil(vol_ft³ / 2)
- 3 ft³ bags = ceil(vol_ft³ / 3)

## Topsoil Calculator

Formulas:
- vol_ft³ = length_ft × width_ft × depth_ft
- vol_yd³ = vol_ft³ / 27
- Order 10–15% extra to account for settling

## Sand Calculator

Formulas:
- vol_ft³ = length_ft × width_ft × depth_ft
- vol_yd³ = vol_ft³ / 27
- tons = vol_yd³ × 1.35 (typical bulk density for dry sand)

## Sod Calculator

Formulas:
- area_ft² = length_ft × width_ft
- rolls = ceil(area_ft² / 10) — standard roll covers ~10 ft²
- pallets = ceil(area_ft² / 450) — standard pallet covers 450–500 ft²
- Order 5–10% extra for cuts and waste
